title: Syrian Chicken Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with chicken, vegetables, and a blend of Syrian spices.
instructions: Heat the buttery in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the cozy stew, syrian spices, and chicken broth.
Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Check the chicken for doneness and adjust the cooking time as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Optional: serve with crusty bread or over rice.
